title: Matt Raynor – Professional Overview
summary: Matt is an AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer with 3 years of experience building production applications. He has four live products deployed. He's currently freelancing from Hampton Bays, NY and actively seeking a full-time remote role in AI engineering, applied ML, or full-stack development.

job_search.status: Freelancing and actively seeking a full-time remote position
goals: Secure a full-time remote AI engineering or full-stack development role
Continue building production-grade AI/ML and full-stack systems
Join a team that values shipping real products
specializations: Computer Vision (TensorFlow.js, MediaPipe, OpenCV, YOLO, ONNX Runtime)
LLM Integration (LangChain, Claude API, OpenAI, RAG systems, pgvector)
Full-Stack Web Development (React, TypeScript, Django, Next.js)

production_projects.ai_shopping_assistant: Agentic AI shopping assistant using LangChain + Claude with semantic search via pgvector, cart management, and ML-powered wall visualization — live at store.matthewraynor.com
production_projects.idp_easycapture: Enterprise computer vision pipeline with TensorFlow.js, MediaPipe, and OpenCV for real-time photo validation, background compositing, and auto-capture — built for IDP Americas
production_projects.totetaxi: Full-stack luxury delivery platform with React 19, TypeScript, Django REST, dynamic pricing, Stripe payments, Onfleet dispatch, and 310+ backend tests — live at totetaxi.com
production_projects.eric_art_mover: Operations platform for fine art logistics with calendar scheduling, PDF invoicing, and AJAX forms — built for Eric Art Mover

ideal_roles: Companies that value shipped products over whiteboard tests

why_hire: 3 years building production applications — four live products deployed right now
Deep experience across the full stack: computer vision, LLM integration, agentic AI, React, Django
Ships real products: agentic AI assistants, enterprise CV pipelines, logistics platforms, e-commerce
Methodical engineering approach — plans deeply, breaks down problems clearly, builds systems that scale
Self-taught and relentlessly driven — the work speaks for itself
